articles.title_en: Fox Launches AdStudio to Unify AI Insights Across Its Ad Portfolio
articles.title_zh: Fox 推出 AdStudio，整合旗下广告组合的 AI 洞察
articles.content_en: Fox launched Fox AdStudio, a platform designed to simplify AI-driven insights across its TV and digital properties. The move consolidates Fox's ad inventory management and audience intelligence under one AI-powered interface. It positions Fox as a direct competitor to other media giants building proprietary ad-tech stacks.
articles.content_zh: Fox 正式推出 Fox AdStudio，旨在将旗下电视与数字媒体资产的 AI 洞察统一到一个平台。该举措将 Fox 的广告库存管理与受众智能整合进同一 AI 界面，与其他正在构建自研广告技术栈的大型媒体公司直接竞争。
articles.so_what_en: If Fox's inventory is in your media plan, request an AdStudio briefing to see whether its AI targeting layers change your buy strategy.
articles.so_what_zh: 若 Fox 资源在你的媒介计划内，主动申请 AdStudio 简报，评估其 AI 定向层是否影响采买策略。

articles.title_en: Berkshire, Chubb Win Approval to Exclude AI Damages From Liability Policies
articles.title_zh: Berkshire、Chubb 获批将 AI 损害责任从企业保险中剔除
articles.content_en: Berkshire Hathaway, Chubb, and Travelers have received U.S. state regulatory approval to exclude AI-related damages from general corporate liability policies. Brokers at Aon, Gallagher, and Lockton warn the exclusions could apply to AI agent errors in marketing workflows, such as an agent improperly using copyrighted material to generate ads. Companies relying on AI-generated creative for paid campaigns may find claims for IP violations uncovered.
articles.content_zh: Berkshire Hathaway、Chubb、Travelers 已获美国各州监管部门批准，可将 AI 相关损害从企业一般责任险中排除。Aon、Gallagher、Lockton 的经纪人警告，该排除条款可能适用于营销工作流中的 AI agent 错误，例如 agent 擅用受版权保护的素材生成广告。依赖 AI 生成创意的付费投放团队，若发生知识产权侵权，可能面临无保险覆盖的风险。
articles.so_what_en: Audit your AI-generated ad creative workflow now and confirm whether your liability policy explicitly covers AI agent IP errors before renewals.
articles.so_what_zh: 立即审查 AI 生成广告创意流程，在保险续期前确认责任险是否覆盖 AI agent 的知识产权侵权风险。

articles.title_zh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.5 System Card
articles.content_en: OpenAI released the system card for GPT-5.5, detailing the model's safety evaluations and deployment specifications. The card is the formal safety disclosure accompanying the model's rollout.
articles.content_zh: OpenAI 发布了 GPT-5.5 的 system card，详细说明该模型的安全评估与部署规格，这是随模型推出的正式安全披露文件。

articles.title_en: Karen Hao at MAICON 2026: AI Adoption Narrative May Be the Wrong Frame
articles.title_zh: Karen Hao 在 MAICON 2026 提出：AI 采用叙事框架或许是错的
articles.content_en: At MAICON 2026, journalist Karen Hao challenged the dominant marketing-and-AI mandate of scaling adoption and showing measurable results. Her argument centers on whether the current pressure to demonstrate AI ROI is pushing teams toward the wrong metrics and away from more durable strategic uses.
articles.content_zh: Karen Hao 在 MAICON 2026 大会上质疑当前营销 AI 的主流叙事，即以规模化采用和可量化结果为目标。她的核心论点是：展示 AI ROI 的压力正推动团队追逐错误指标，偏离更具持续性的战略用途。
articles.so_what_en: Before your next AI budget review, pressure-test whether your metrics measure durable capability-building or just short-term output volume.
articles.so_what_zh: 在下次 AI 预算评审前，检验你的衡量指标是在考核持续能力建设，还是仅在统计短期产出量。

articles.title_en: AI4S Startup Aomingxingcheng Closes Series A Above 100 Million Yuan
articles.title_zh: AI4S 企业奥明星程完成超亿元 A 轮融资
articles.content_en: Aomingxingcheng, an AI for Science company focused on biological intelligence infrastructure, closed a Series A above 100 million yuan. Investors include Shenzhen Capital Group, Fosun Pharma, and Taiping Equity. The company is led by three Harvard-trained scientists and aims to move AI from pattern-fitting toward mechanistic disease modeling.
articles.content_zh: 聚焦生物智能基础设施的 AI4S 企业奥明星程完成超亿元 A 轮融资，投资方包括深创投、复星医药旗下复健资本和太平股权。公司由三位哈佛博士联合创立，目标是推动 AI 从结果拟合走向疾病机制建模。

articles.title_en: Qianli Technology Claims 460,000 Vehicles in Six Months as AI-Native Driver
articles.title_zh: 千里科技半年装车量突破 46 万辆，以 AI-native 模式切入智驾市场
articles.content_en: Qianli Technology announced at its April 22 strategy event that its intelligent driving system has been installed in 460,000 vehicles across 17 Zeekr and Lynk & Co models, achieved within roughly six months of commercial launch. The company projects crossing 1 million units in 2026. Unlike incumbent players, Qianli built its stack around large models from day one, covering AI infrastructure, a full data loop, and rapid model productization, a design it claims cuts traditional engineering adaptation cycles significantly.
articles.content_zh: 千里科技在 4 月 22 日战略发布会上披露，其智能驾驶系统已在极氪、领克共 17 款车型上装车 46 万辆，从品牌发布到规模量产仅用半年多，并预计 2026 年跨入百万量级。公司从底层围绕大模型构建能力体系，涵盖 AI Infra、完整数据闭环与模型快速工程化，自称可大幅压缩传统适配周期。
articles.so_what_en: Watch Qianli as a distribution case study: AI-native stacks are compressing go-to-market timelines in hardware-adjacent verticals.
articles.so_what_zh: 关注千里科技的分发路径：AI-native 技术栈正在硬件相邻赛道大幅压缩产品上市周期。

articles.title_en: Ethan Mollick: GPT-5.5 Is a Glimpse of the Capability Curve Ahead
articles.title_zh: Ethan Mollick：GPT-5.5 预示能力曲线的下一段走向
articles.content_en: Wharton professor Ethan Mollick published a hands-on read of GPT-5.5, framing it as one meaningful step on an ongoing capability curve rather than a ceiling. His core argument: practitioners who treat each new frontier model release as a stable baseline to build on will keep getting surprised — the curve is still moving. The post urges marketers and builders to stay empirical rather than locking in assumptions about what AI can or cannot do.
articles.content_zh: 沃顿商学院教授 Ethan Mollick 发布了对 GPT-5.5 的实测评估，将其定位为能力曲线上的一个阶段性节点，而非终点。核心论点：把每次 frontier model 发布当作稳定基线来规划产品的从业者，会持续被超越。他建议从业者保持实证心态，不要过早锁定 AI 能力边界的假设。
articles.so_what_en: Build AI-assisted workflows with modular steps you can swap out when the next model ships — don't hard-code capability assumptions.
articles.so_what_zh: 用模块化步骤搭建 AI 工作流，每步可随新模型上线随时替换，不要把当前模型能力写死进流程。

articles.title_en: Lenny Rachitsky: Why He Pays $180/M Tokens for GPT-5.5 Pro in Codex Work
articles.title_zh: Lenny Rachitsky：为何在 Codex 工作流中愿付 $180/M tokens 买 GPT-5.5 Pro
articles.content_en: Lenny Rachitsky published a video episode arguing GPT-5.5 Pro justifies its $180-per-million output token price for high-stakes reasoning tasks. His specific trigger: GPT-5.5 Pro completed an intelligence eval inside his Codex workflow that Claude Code repeatedly failed. The thesis is straightforward — for tasks where failure is costly, token price becomes a secondary concern relative to task completion rate.
articles.content_zh: Lenny Rachitsky 发布视频，论证 GPT-5.5 Pro 在高价值推理任务中值得支付 $180/M output tokens 的定价。具体触发点：在他的 Codex 工作流中，有一个 Claude Code 反复失败的 intelligence eval，GPT-5.5 Pro 完成了。核心逻辑：当失败成本高时，token 单价的重要性低于任务完成率。
articles.so_what_en: Audit your highest-failure-rate AI tasks first — premium model cost may be offset by reduced error cycles.
articles.so_what_zh: 先审查失败率最高的 AI 任务，用高价模型替换后节省的返工成本可能覆盖溢价。

articles.title_en: Google Publishes TPU Architecture Explainer for Cloud AI Workloads
articles.title_zh: Google 发布 TPU 架构解析，面向云端 AI 推理需求
articles.content_en: Google's AI Blog released a video and explainer covering how its TPUs handle increasingly compute-intensive AI workloads on Google Cloud. The post targets engineers and enterprise buyers evaluating infrastructure for large-scale inference and training. No new hardware was announced; the content is positioned as educational marketing for Google Cloud's AI infrastructure stack.
articles.content_zh: Google AI Blog 发布视频及配套解析，介绍 TPU 如何承载日益繁重的 AI 推理与 training 工作负载，受众为评估云端 AI 基础设施的工程师和企业采购方。本次未发布新硬件，内容定位为 Google Cloud AI infrastructure 的品牌教育材料。
articles.so_what_en: If you're comparing cloud AI vendors, use Google's own framing to pressure-test Nvidia/AWS positioning in your RFP conversations.
articles.so_what_zh: 评估云端 AI 供应商时，可借助 Google 的官方叙述，在 RFP 谈判中测试竞对定位。

articles.title_en: Tolaria: Open-Source macOS App for Markdown Knowledge Bases with AI Support
articles.title_zh: Tolaria：支持 AI 的开源 macOS Markdown 知识库管理工具
articles.content_en: Luca, author of the Refactoring newsletter, shipped Tolaria — an offline-first, file-based macOS app for managing large Markdown knowledge bases, with git support and opinionated note-typing. Built on 10K personal notes and 300+ articles accumulated over 6 years. It earned 90 upvotes and 30 comments on Show HN within the first day, with the open-source repo live on GitHub.
articles.content_zh: Refactoring 简报作者 Luca 发布 Tolaria，一款 offline-first、基于文件的开源 macOS 知识库应用，支持 git、强制笔记分类与关系管理，原型来自本人 10K 条笔记、300 余篇文章的 6 年积累。Show HN 首日获 90 赞、30 条评论，GitHub 仓库已公开。
articles.so_what_en: Content marketers managing large editorial archives should watch Tolaria as a lightweight AI-ready alternative to Notion or Obsidian.
articles.so_what_zh: 维护大规模内容档案的内容营销团队，可将 Tolaria 列入 Notion / Obsidian 的替代观察名单。

articles.title_en: From Pharma Rep to MedTech Founder: How Rule-Learning Becomes Rule-Making
articles.title_zh: 从药代到医疗器械创始人的规则认知路径
articles.content_en:
## Background & Numbers
WeiCan Medical founder Li Qiang left a clinical role at Shanghai No.9 Hospital at 30 to join Pfizer as a pharma rep, then pivoted to Medtronic at a pay cut, then 3M and B. Braun, before founding what the company claims is the world's first implantable drug delivery device platform covering venous, arterial, spinal, abdominal, dialysis, and intracranial scenarios. Huachuang Capital led the seed round exclusively in 2023 and followed on.

## Breakdown
1. **Cross-industry moves are a distribution intelligence play** Li Qiang tracked how pharma, devices, and distributors each set purchase rules, then mapped the gap — four years before starting his own company.
2. **Lowering your title to widen your pattern library pays off** One year shadowing 400+ surgeries at Medtronic gave Li Qiang clinical depth his sales peers lacked, becoming the credential that justified a founder story.
3. **Timing the exit from a declining market is a positioning prerequisite** Li Qiang called the end of pharma's golden decade in 2014 and moved early, arriving in devices before the crowding started.

## How to Apply
- [ ] Map your category's purchase decision chain to identify who writes the rules
- [ ] Use competitor channel experience to reverse-engineer your own GTM blind spots
- [ ] Shift category positioning before the market decline signal becomes consensus
articles.content_zh:
## 背景与数据
炜璨医疗创始人李强30岁从上海九院辞职加入辉瑞做药代,随后降职降薪跳槽美敦力,再历经3M、贝朗,最终创办了公司声称全球首个覆盖静脉、动脉、脊柱等全场景植入式给药装置平台。华创资本2023年独家领投种子轮并持续加注。

## 问题拆解
1. **跨行是采购规则情报收集** 李强系统拆解药品、器械、经销商三套规则,历时4年积累再创业。
2. **降职是扩大认知库的主动投资** 一年跟400台手术,换来药代同行没有的临床深度,成为创始人叙事的核心凭证。
3. **提前判断赛道衰退是定位前提** 2014年预判医改终结药品黄金十年,在器械拥挤前完成跑道切换。

## 你可以怎么用
- [ ] 梳理行业采购决策链,找规则制定方
- [ ] 用竞品渠道经历倒推自己的 GTM 盲区
- [ ] 在市场衰退信号出现前转换品类定位
articles.so_what_en: Map who writes the purchase rules in your category before you write your positioning.
articles.so_what_zh: 搞清楚谁在制定品类采购规则,再写定位。
